title: Daimler Postpones Liquid-Hydrogen Truck Production to Early 2030s Due to 'Sluggish Expansion' of H2
content: German manufacturer Daimler Truck is postponing its series production of the GenH2 liquid-hydrogen trucks as part of the companyâ€™s restructure effort to be more â€œprofitable and resilientâ€. The manufacturer cited uncertainties on energy prices, subsidies and different decarbonization speeds as reasons for the delayed production.
author: Analysts Account
